problems.diagnostic: Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations
problems.cause: Assign statements are in a component type annex
problems.minimal_edit: Move the assign statements to the component implementation annex

executor_steps: Move the assign statements from the component type annex to the component implementation annex
Ensure the component implementation annex is properly structured and placed after the subcomponents and connections
Verify that the moved assign statements are valid in the new context
